general_notes: Bridge to Home Outreach CRA program — broker channel only (not in-house underwrite).
2 qualification paths: DTI (full doc) or DTA (asset-based, no income needed).
CRA eligible: subject property in LMI census tract (FFIEC) OR borrower income <= 80% of Area Median Income (AMI).
No price hit for investment property or cash-out transaction.
Accept any kind of VISA — B1/B2, F1, J1, EAD, etc. with no additional price hit. Foreign Nationals OK.
100% gift funds allowed for primary, 2nd home, AND investment purchase.
DTA path: equity in REO can be used as reserve (non-liquid portion).
Available in select counties in CA, NV, WA, TX, GA, MA, NY — 7 states.
Lender comp = 1. Cannot charge additional point. No off-rate sheet pricing.
Borrowers from OFAC countries are ineligible. Borrowers from high-risk countries may be OK subject to BSA review.
Prohibited businesses per Exhibit B. Higher-risk prospective customers per Exhibit C — subject to BSA review.

additional_rules.description: Universe CRA with full-doc DTI qualification. Broker channel only.
additional_rules.cra_note: LMI tract per FFIEC OR borrower income <= 80% of Area Median Income (AMI).
additional_rules.qualification_path: DTI (full doc). Max DTI 55% for purchase/R/T, 43% for cash-out.
additional_rules.channel: Broker channel only — not in-house underwrite.
additional_rules.loan_amount_refi: Conforming loan amount only (R/T and cash-out)
additional_rules.income_doc_salaried: 1 current YTD paystub + W2 or WVOE with YTD and 1 year income history
additional_rules.employment_history: Min 1 year (6 months may be OK with compensating factors)
additional_rules.qualifying_rate_arm: Higher of note rate or fully indexed rate
additional_rules.fico_below_660: Below 660 or no FICO: reduce max LTV by 5% (70% purchase/R/T, 55% cash-out)
additional_rules.credit_profile: 0x30x12 mortgage. Installment/revolving: 3x30x12. Rolling lates allowed if current and counts as 1 instance. 30-day lates on multiple tradelines in same month counts as 1 instance.
additional_rules.gift_funds: 100% gift funds allowed for all occupancy types (purchase). Gift funds cannot be used as reserves.
additional_rules.foreign_nationals: All visa types accepted with no price hit. Foreign nationals OK. Must not be from OFAC countries.
additional_rules.cash_out_ltv: 60% max LTV for cash-out. TX cash-out NOT allowed.
additional_rules.min_borrower_own_funds: No minimum — 100% gift OK for down payment and cash to close
additional_rules.eligible_properties: SFR, 2 units, attached/detached PUD, warranted condo. 1-2 units only.
additional_rules.poa: OK except for cash-out. Borrower MUST wet sign initial 1003.
additional_rules.itin: Need 2 forms of ID (valid foreign passport OK)
additional_rules.vesting: Individual or Trust — no business vesting
additional_rules.lender_comp: Lender comp = 1. Cannot charge additional point. No off-rate sheet pricing.
additional_rules.focus_areas: LA County, Orange County, 5 boroughs of New York (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, Staten Island)
additional_rules.focus_consumers: Underserved community including Hispanic and African American

additional_rules.description: Universe CRA with DTA (asset-based) qualification. No income needed. Broker channel only.
additional_rules.cra_note: LMI tract per FFIEC OR borrower income <= 80% of Area Median Income (AMI).
additional_rules.qualification_path: DTA (Debt to Asset) <= 60% including subject value and loan amount. No income documentation needed — employment info only on 1003.
additional_rules.channel: Broker channel only — not in-house underwrite.
additional_rules.loan_amount_refi: Conforming loan amount only (R/T and cash-out)
additional_rules.income_doc: None required. No income on 1003. Need source of wealth if not currently employed.
additional_rules.qualifying_rate_arm: Higher of note rate or fully indexed rate
additional_rules.fico_below_660: Below 660 or no FICO: reduce max LTV by 5% (70% purchase/R/T, 55% cash-out)
additional_rules.credit_profile: 0x30x12 mortgage. Installment/revolving: 3x30x12. Rolling lates allowed if current and counts as 1 instance. 30-day lates on multiple tradelines in same month counts as 1 instance.
additional_rules.reserves: 36 months PITIA — 18 months must be liquid. Gift funds or cash-out proceeds cannot be used as reserves.
additional_rules.dta_assets: Stock/Bond 100%. Retirement account 100% for DTA, 70% for liquid reserve. Equity from tangible assets (autos, REO net of lien) OK. Foreign assets OK if at least 12 months liquid reserve in USA.
additional_rules.foreign_funds: Foreign funds for cash to close must be in USA prior to doc.
additional_rules.gift_funds: 100% gift funds allowed for all occupancy types (purchase). Gift funds cannot be used as reserves.
additional_rules.foreign_nationals: All visa types accepted with no price hit. Foreign nationals OK. Must not be from OFAC countries.
additional_rules.cash_out_ltv: 60% max LTV for cash-out. TX cash-out NOT allowed.
additional_rules.min_borrower_own_funds: No minimum — 100% gift OK for down payment and cash to close
additional_rules.eligible_properties: SFR, 2 units, attached/detached PUD, warranted condo. 1-2 units only.
additional_rules.poa: OK except for cash-out. Borrower MUST wet sign initial 1003.
additional_rules.itin: Need 2 forms of ID (valid foreign passport OK)
additional_rules.vesting: Individual or Trust — no business vesting
additional_rules.non_liquid_reserves: Equity in REO can be used as non-liquid portion of reserve requirement
additional_rules.lender_comp: Lender comp = 1. Cannot charge additional point. No off-rate sheet pricing.
additional_rules.focus_areas: LA County, Orange County, 5 boroughs of New York (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, The Bronx, Staten Island)
additional_rules.focus_consumers: Underserved community including Hispanic and African American
